---
title: "CV"
toc: false
page-layout: full
body-classes: cv-page
---

```{=html}
<div class="card">
  <div class="card-header d-flex justify-content-end gap-2">
    <a href="cv.pdf" target="_blank" class="btn btn-outline-primary btn-sm" title="Open in New Tab">
      <i class="bi bi-box-arrow-up-right"></i> Open in New Tab
    </a>
    <a href="cv.pdf" download class="btn btn-primary btn-sm" title="Download CV">
      <i class="bi bi-download"></i> Download
    </a>
  </div>
  <div class="card-body p-0">
    <iframe src="cv.pdf" title="Michael Kerr CV"></iframe>
  </div>
</div>
```
